headings: Section 12. Applications for Payment, Releases, Lien-Free Project
text: - Section 20. Protection of Work. Subcontractor shall effectively secure and protect its materials, equipment and the Subcontract Work, and shall bear and be liable for all loss and/or damage of any kind in connection therewith at any time prior to the final completion and acceptance thereof, subject to the provisions of Section 24 hereof, to the extent they apply. The Subcontractor shall be responsible for and shall reimburse the Contractor on demand for any breakage or other damage to other work or materials or property to the extent caused by the Subcontractor in the execution  of  this  Subcontract,  and  Contractor  may  offset  any  such  damages  against  any  sum  due  Subcontractor under this Subcontract or any other agreement.
